title: One Block Reloaded
description: 🪓 One Block Reloaded — start from one block and reach the stars!
body:
# 🪓 One Block Reloaded — start from one block and reach the stars!

One Block Reloaded is a fresh take on the classic “one block” challenge. You begin on a single block of dirt — but this time, it’s not just survival. It’s a technological and cosmic adventure!

 🧱 Features:

 🌍 Start with a single block and expand your world step by step!

⚙️ Create — build complex factories, machines, and steam-powered systems!

🚀 Ad Astra — explore space, travel to different planets, and build your own base on the Moon or Mars!

🔧 Optimized performance, balanced gameplay, and smooth progression.

🪐 Optional shaders and visual mods for an immersive experience.

💡 Perfect for players who love:
Starting from nothing, building machines, exploring space, and creating their own world one block at a time!
